entry.title: How to make a CFL based field non-editable in SAP GUI transaction ?
entry.content:
I am trying to add a field to Business Context PS_PROJECT using Custom Fields App.

I am able to add the field and enable it on Project Definition tcodes ( CJ01/02/03 )

Having said that the field is editable by default. Now i have a required to make this field non-editable. Key point here is this field is on a SAP-GUI transaction and not out of the box Fiori app

How can this be achieved ?

entry.title: DISPATCHER GRAY
entry.content:
Hi, Experts!

well i'm really not sure about what happen with dispatcher

servidoraapp:YYYadm 1003> sapcontrol -nr 00 -function GetProcessList
04.09.2024 17:08:49
GetProcessList
OK
name, description, dispstatus, textstatus, starttime, elapsedtime, pid
disp+work, Dispatcher, GRAY, Stopped, , , 4244
igswd_mt, IGS Watchdog, GREEN, Running, 2024 09 04 14:41:27, 2:27:22, 4245

servidoraapp:YYYadm 1004> sapcontrol -nr 01 -function GetProcessList
04.09.2024 17:08:56
GetProcessList
OK
name, description, dispstatus, textstatus, starttime, elapsedtime, pid
msg_server, MessageServer, GREEN, Running, 2024 09 04 14:41:22, 2:27:34, 3980
enq_server, Enqueue Server 2, GREEN, Running, 2024 09 04 14:41:22, 2:27:34, 3981

already check: the ports its ok! the hostname on the OS and DB its ok! the license its ok! the firewall desactivate! the ping resolved on the OS and DB. shutdown applicative SAP to level OS and stop DB, and restart the box, review the resources of memory it's ok, the notes in sap: 3390633,2667891,3392400 it's ok.  and used the command df it's ok. but the problem persist. attached the log  dev_disp and dev_w0.

HDB version info:
version: 2.00.076.00.1705400033
branch: fa/hana2sp07
machine config: linuxx86_64

please help me to resolved this problem

Txs in advanced.

entry.title: Re: Important Notice: Changes in SAP Analytics Cloud Classic Stories & Analytic Applications
entry.content:
@comercial_cinfa we will post more concrete timelines in the coming weeks. Our recommendation is to migrate existing content as soon as possible as the Optimized Experience has been the platform where we have been delivering critical innovation such as Composites, Model Repointing, Present Mode, and more.

For new assets, it is recommend to directly create them within the Optimized Experience to avoid having to go through a one time migration.

entry.title: Re: Important Notice: Changes in SAP Analytics Cloud Classic Stories & Analytic Applications
entry.content: @VivekKumarVS we are in the process of building a Bulk Migration Tool which will help migrate multiple assets at the same time to the Optimized Experience. Within the Bulk Migration Tool we will filter down the list of assets to those that are in the Classic Experience.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I identify as a person in the below categories:

    • People in remote or underserved locations that may be not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts 
    • People looking to switch their careers mid-life

I come from Agra, India, a small city where we do not have economic opportunities as there are in urban locations. 

I am 37 years old and want to switch my career to SAP implementation projects. This is a completely new field for me to get into and this certification would be really helpful to kickstart my career in SAP ERP space. 

I have completed my learning journey for the Certificate program - 'SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition'.
 
Could I please receive my free certification exam attempt. Thank you,

 

Regards,

Gaurav Yadav

I can retrieve print queue items through the API_CLOUD_PRINT_PULL_SRV/RetrieveNextQueueItem and it seems to update the status to 'Transmitted' when we send a request. How can I update the status to 'Failed' or 'Successful' of a print queue item?

Thanks in advance.

JP

entry.title: Can't create destination service for a UI5 app for Build Work Zone
entry.content:
Full disclosure: Very experienced developer, but totally new to this product.

I am following the steps for Develop an App for SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition with Your Own Dev Tools.

I am on this page. When I perform the steps to deploy the application, I am getting the following error when it goes to create the destination service: Service broker error: Service broker destination-service-broker failed with: Service broker parameters are invalid: Destination name: contains invalid character.

What I believe is the relevant section of the mta.yaml file is as follows:

resources:
  - name: tutorial.myui5project-destination-service
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    parameters:
      service: destination
      service-name: tutorial.myui5project-destination-service
      service-plan: lite
      config:
        HTML5Runtime_enabled: true
        version: 0.0.1
        init_data:
          instance:
            existing_destinations_policy: update
            destinations:
              - Name: ""
                Authentication: NoAuthentication
                ProxyType: Internet
                Type: HTTP
                URL: https://services.odata.org
                HTML5.DynamicDestination: true
                HTML5.ForwardAuthToken: true
 
This was all generated automatically by following the tutorial steps. A lot of Googling and searching the SAP KB has led me nowhere.  Any ideas?
 
Al

entry.title: Cannot Cancel a Sales Order, Reason for Rejection is Disabled.
entry.content:
Hi there,

We cant cancel the sales order. The reason for rejection field on General tab and Items are disabled, not able to maintain a value to cancel the order. 

The sales order items are with type= Service - fixed price (project)

  • Delivery status=in process.
  • Invoice status=Finished.
  • Reason for rejection are all disabled/grayed out.

Thanks and best,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Cannot Cancel a Sales Order, Reason for Rejection is...
entry.content:
The reason for rejection is disabled on a sales order line when one of the following conditions met.

  • The delivery status is Finished. or
  • The invoice status is Finished.

If it is a delivery based item, you will need to cancel the following invoice and outbound deliveries to revoke the invoice and delivery status. 

If it is a project based item, you will need to revoke the invoicing status via Project Invoicing - Sales Order view - Change Status button. And revoke delivery status by changing the reference project task back from completed/closed status.

You can get more information from the KBA: 2644606 - How to maintain the Reason for Rejection in Project Based Sales Order Item (https://me.sap.com/notes/2644606)

In the case here, since the invoice status is finished, the cancellation is not allowed. You will have to revoke the invoice status back from finished.

Thanks,

Adie

entry.title: Restriction of supplier invoice number in VIM duplication check

entry.title: How to Automate "Set Ready for Shipping" status for Outbound Delivery?

entry.title: How to have CAP Multi-tenant Data Isolation without any Tenant accounts
entry.content:
Background

Hi! My team is trying to create an CAP application for an existing service. We want to use the functionality of the Multi-tenant data isolation to create tenant specific containers in Hana DB. Moreover, we want to use a single XSUAA instance with single Bearer token to access said containers directly. However, we do not want to create Subaccounts or want to expose the CAP application to the users.

Desired Flow
Onboarding:

  1. Users subscribe to existing service

  2. Service triggers subscription to this CAP Application, where cap `tenantId` is set as a combination of user `tenantId` and `instanceId`

  3. Subscription creates HDI Containers linked to the cap `tenantId`

    Using POST http://endpoint/-/cds/deployment/subscribe

During normal runtime:

Some of the requests from users will be passed to the CAP application to be processed in their specific container and authentication is done using the same XSUAA internal bearer token from service

Steps Taken

  • Subscribing using custom `tenantId`

    • Outcome: Success - Containers are also created without any issues

    • Problem: Unable to access these containers as XSUAA is unable to authenticate

  • Using the same Bearer token generated by Provider Account to access tenant container

    • Outcome: Failure

    • Problem: Token used by service manager to get context for Provider account, resulting in all requests to be accessing the same container, the mtx information container

  • Creating Subaccount and subscribing to CAP app using created Subaccount `tenantId` only

    • Outcome: Success - Can access tenant specific container, authentication done using XSUAA shared `clientId` and `clientSecret` but using the Subaccount domain to generate bearer token

    • Problem: Not the desired flow

Can I check if CAP supports this use case? Any help would be appreciated in this matter! Thanks!

entry.title: Re: ODATA API ‘Attachments’ Service in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Prabha,

Thank you for a detailed blog.

We want to create a PO and add attachments using standard API's in S/4 Hana on Premise system. We have found below 2 API's

API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV

API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV

 

Our requirement to attach the documents at the time of PO creation. Kindly let me know is it possible to call these API's  in sequence or any other alternative approach is there.

entry.title: Re: Different Configuration in QA and production system in Employee Central
entry.content:
Hi Rakesh,

Couple of Questions ...

1. Have the customer/project Gone live? If yes, then do an instant Refresh from Prod to QA.

2. If Project has not gone live, then Import/Export Templates/Config from QA to Prod. 

Hope this answers in a short way..

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear @David_Chaviano 

 

Myself Naidu, I am writing to express my interest in pursuing SAP certification, with a specific focus on Developing SAP UI5 Applications. As someone who identifies with key underrepresented groups, including individuals from remote or underserved locations, first-generation college students, and those seeking mid-life career transitions, I am committed to acquiring the skills and knowledge necessary to excel in SAP technology.

Having successfully completed the "Developing SAP UI5 Applications" learning journey, I have gained a solid understanding of SAP's Development processes and am now eager to deepen my expertise in SAP UI5 application development with certification. I am fully prepared to embrace the challenges of this certification and am excited about the opportunities it will unlock in my career.

Thank you for considering my commitment to professional growth and learning. I look forward to the opportunity to further develop my skills in SAP UI5 Applications and contribute meaningfully to the industry.

Sincerely,

Karri Naidu

+91 8247262816

entry.title: Exception handling of decision is working unexpectedly.
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I am currently encountering an issue with a flexible workflow custom scenario that I have configured, and I would appreciate your assistance in resolving it.

Scenario:

  • Current Workflow:

    1. User 1 approves. -> Inbox notification is sent to User 2.
    2. User 2 approves. -> Inbox notification is sent to User 3.
    3. User 3 rejects.     -> Inbox notification is sent back to User 2.
    4. User 2 rejects.     -> The scenario ends.

  • Expected Workflow:

    1. User 1 approves. -> Inbox notification is sent to User 2.
    2. User 2 approves. -> Inbox notification is sent to User 3.
    3. User 3 rejects.     -> Inbox notification is sent back to User 2.
    4. User 2 rejects.     -> Inbox notification is sent back to User 1.
    5. User 1 rejects.     -> The scenario ends.

The workflow currently stops after User 2's second rejection, but it should be returning to User 1 for a final rejection. I have attached a screenshot of my workflow configuration for your reference.

Could you please review the configuration and help identify why the workflow isn't behaving as expected?

Thank you in advance for your support.
Best regards.

entry.title: pMRP release failure
entry.content:
pMRP simulation and processing is completed without any problem. (Some materials with MRP type ND were not simulated).

While releasing the processed simulation, “release failed” appears.

Support is requested to fix this issue.

entry.title: Re: GST Margin scheme on second hand material purchases
entry.content: Hi, Problem in making in the pricing schema is, for correct planned delivery cost related GST calculations, SAP has suggested routine 362 to be changed as suggested in the note 2474945. By this changes (assigned new routine 900 with suggested changes) the planned delivery cost is calculating correctly at the time of MIRO of planned delivery cost and all other pricings except this second hand purchases related Pricing scheme, where it is calculating on total value i.e., on 10 instead of Margin value Rs.4/-.

entry.title: Re: which minimum netweaver release for CDS views
entry.content:
Hi Holger.
Version should be supported but on a very Basic Level. Eclipse lists CDS views as "DDLS".

Does that help?

entry.title: Standard Filter Options for a DateTime SDK field is not working
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

 

We have created a filter for an SDK field with Data Element "Global.BASIS : DateTime" however for some reason the Filter Options (in OWL screen) are not working aside from "Current year" and "Last 365 days" , other options does not produce any result. Any idea why is this happening?

entry.title: Re: DISPATCHER GRAY
entry.content: Hello, The attached logs indicated a problem when work process trying to connect to HANA DB. You can try from OS level command "R3trans -d" by sidadm user. Most likely it will finish in error and generate a trans.log to show details. You may want to check the DB status, whether it is up and running, or any error within DB specific logs. Not likely an OS problem.

entry.title: Re: Exception handling of decision is working unexpectedly.
entry.content: You have posted links to the images, I guess people won't open them one by one. Please embed the images (Insert photos of existing files OR your preferred tool for screenshots and Ctrl+V to paste the image).

entry.title: Re: SAP AEM requirement and guidance
entry.content: Hi Rama - some of your questions are easy to answer whereas others need further exploration / thinking. For example, there is no difference from AEM perspective whether you are sending a data or notification event. AEM can carry both. Regarding partner consuming the event using AMQP, it is possible and in that case it is better you send out a full data event instead of notification event. It really depends on what you want to achieve. If you don't want your partner to call S4 then use data event - that's my favourite approach as it reduces the chatter between S4 and consumer application and also reduces query load on S4. Hope this helps.

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP - Event Mesh Consumption of Messages Not working
entry.content: Same issue here, don't define 'messaging' inside the function call only.

entry.title: Re: ECP connectivity with MBC (Mutli Bank Connectivity)
entry.content:
Hey Bjorn - yes you can connect ECP to MBC as per the recommendation from SAP, however there are add ons that should be installed in order to get this up and running. Refer the add ons in KB 2167337 and please reach out to MBC onboarding team at SAP once the license is secured. 

BR,

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration - Advanced Event Mesh Adapter Issue
entry.content: Awesome. Thanks for the update.

entry.title: Katowice - SAP Stammtisch 10.09.2024
entry.content:
The local SAP Community in Katowice will meet very soon again!

SAP Stammtisch in Katowice will happen on September 10th, 2024 at 6 PM CET, so join us and be a part of our Group!

Let's meet at the end of the summer and talk about what's new in the SAP world, about interesting SAP projects in the region, and what's new with ourselves.

This time we will meet at Biała Małpa Pub in Katowice, very close to the train and bus station.

Please let us know if you will participate in SAP Stammtisch by clicking "I will attend" - if you do that, I believe, this will encourage others to come too!

Find more information in the blog posts board: spotkanie-katowickiej-grupy-sap-community

and we also invite you to join the Katowice Group if you are not a member yet: SAP Community Katowice

entry.title: BTP CF APPROUTER AuthType None Problems
entry.content:
Hello

We are currently distributing UI* (React APP) and back-end API (JAVA) on BTP CF.

The UI app was deployed as a CFPUSH using STATIC BUILDPACK and was assigned the domain address TEST-UI.CFAPPS.

The JAVA app was deployed as CFPUSH using JAVA BUILDPACK, and was assigned the domain address TEST-BACKEND.CFAPPS.

We added a BTP CF Appouter that connects two apps, distributed them as CFPUSH, and assigned the domain address TEST-ROUTER.CFAPPS.

And, the router assigned the path of each app.
The TEST-ROUTER.CFAPPS./UI/INDEX.HTML path was mapped to TEST-UI.CFAPPS.
The TEST-ROUTER.CFAPPS../API/ path was mapped to TEST-BACKEND.CFAPPS.

In this situation, I would like to have users accessed from ROUTER (i.e., access to TEST-ROUTER.CFAPPS..) without login authentication from XSUAA. To do this, I set XS-APP. JSON auth to none in the app router to solve this problem.

This is where the additional issues arise.

I don't want to allow access only through the app router and access through separate UI apps (TEST-UI.CFAPPS..) and Java API (TEST-ROUTER.CFAPPS..).

Is there a way to block direct access to the cf push domain to these two apps that have allocated routers?

Java is back and end, so I think I can analyze REQUEST and block it, but I don't know how to do it in STATIC BUILDPACK.

entry.title: Re: Error During ChangeSet Offline Call
entry.content: Can you share the $metadata for the entity set? Typically I would expect this to be creating related entities or include links between the items and header.

entry.title: Re: Następne spotkanie grupy katowickiej
entry.content:
Cześć Katowice SAP Community, 

kilka osób kontaktowało się ze mną przez community.sap oraz linkedin w sprawie następnego terminu spotkania SAP Stammtisch. Padła propozycja 10 września, więc takie wydarzenie opublikowałam: katowice-sap-stammtisch-10-09-2024 i wszystkich chętnych zapraszamy tym razem do Białej Małpy w Katowicach 🙂 Daj znać jeżeli się wybierasz poprzez zaznaczenie "yes for attending", by zachęcić niezdecydowanych także do przyjścia 🙂

entry.title: Re: Schemes - Buy X quantity of material for free on purc...
entry.content: Thank you team. i have raised influence request.

entry.title: Re: How to Automate "Set Ready for Shipping" status for O...
entry.content:
Hi @Prashanth2_D 

Please check the below link for automatic Status set...let us know if any questions.https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/9832125c23154a179bfa1784cdc9577a/e64fc2a423bf4a8daae19892ab103403.html

Excerpt from link "To have the system set the status to Ready automatically, you can make settings in Customizing for Extended Warehouse Management under Goods Issue Process  Outbound Delivery  Integration for Transportation Planning  Set Shipping Readiness for Deliveries Automatically. You can define at which point an outbound delivery order can be set to ready for shipping. You can then run the report Automatically Set Status of Deliveries to Ready for Shipping /SCWM/R_SET_DSH_STAT_AUTOMATIC, which analyzes your Customizing settings, finds matching outbound delivery orders, and sets their shipping readiness status to Ready."

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
I’m Mohammad Osama Masood, a dedicated SAP SuccessFactors consultant with two years of experience in delivering cutting-edge HR solutions. My expertise in leveraging SuccessFactors modules has enabled me to enhance organizational efficiency and drive strategic HR initiatives effectively. With a solid foundation in configuring and implementing various SuccessFactors components, including Compensation, LMS, Time Management and EC, I bring both technical proficiency and a passion for innovation to every project.

My experience has honed my ability to address complex challenges and deliver impactful results. I thrive in collaborative environments and am committed to continuous learning to stay ahead of industry trends. Joining the SAP Digital Initiatives Program would be the perfect opportunity for me to combine my expertise with cutting-edge technology to revolutionize HR processes in various industries. I look forward to contributing to transformative HR projects and supporting organizational growth through tailored SuccessFactors solutions.

entry.title: Re: Request to host a CodeJam in Bangalore

entry.title: Add new fields in FPR1 Tcode
entry.content:
Experts,

I see that events 3000 to 3050 are related to Inst. Plan. I want to add a new field to capture Social security number(SSN) in FPR1 Tcode. Once the user enters SSN, I want to fetch the user name from backend and display next to the SSN No. 

I see that SAP has given provision to add new fields in FPE1 Tcode. Is there a way we can add screen fields in FPR1 Tcode. I want to be able to add in screen 200 which is the first screen where you land after you enter the Contract a/c in the initial FPR1 selection screen.

Thanks

Bharath

entry.title: Re: Need help on SAC Parameters for date selection in Dat...
entry.content:
Hi @Sacbiconsultant 

You can create a parameter as follows to be able to select any level in the dimension hierarchy e.g. year level:

During execution, users can then select the respective year:

 The parameter can then be used in all Data Action Steps. For Advanced Formulars, as they operate on leaf-level, it is usually necessary to transfer the node (here year level) to the respective leaves:

 For a full reference of Advanced Formula syntax, check https://help.sap.com/doc/5516580733124039b673c530125771b3/2024.15/en-US/index.html#BASEMEMBER

Hope this does help!

It is already 3 days like that.

It worked in both places before that.

SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: ABAP Enterprise Service - RFC Consumer - Where maintain RFC Destination / Logical Port
entry.content:
Hi,

we have a SAP S4 system and we did generate a RFC Consumer Proxy based on a RFC function call on another SAP System. 

The code generation did work fine but i dont see where i can maintain the logical port / the rfc destination for the runtime.

In SOAMANAGER I don´t find the consumer and in LP_CONFIG I dont see where to put the RFC Destination.

Someone an Idea?

Best regards Richard

entry.title: Re: REST vs. OData in SAP PO
entry.content:
I have read recently somewhere that you have to do always a GET first to retrieve the XSRF token that you have to add to the header for the POST/PATCH actions on the Odata Service. But not remember if this is always the same or only in certain circumstances.

Wondering how this can be achieved by SAP PO easily - Better to think about Cloud Integration ...

BR Helmut

entry.title: Re: SAP IAS BP
entry.content: I suggest to use the Test IAS only for Sandbox and the Production IAS for all other Subaccounts.

entry.title: Crystal Reports 2020 Ole Object retain design size and aspect ratio
entry.content:
For many years we have used the Crystal 11.5 crviewer.dll and craxdrt.dll to allow dynamic display of images within a report in a fixed sized Ole Object. As each row was processed we read the image and resized it to maintain its aspect ratio and loaded it into the Ole Object. 

We are now looking to ship a 64bit viewer and have Crystal 2020 with the .Net Visual Studio Developer packs. It appears that you can no longer access the report engine to do row by row processing. When using the Report design tool you are able to set the Graphic Location to one of the data source columns and then select the Respect Scaling option in the Display method. This forces Can Grow to be turned on which means that the Ole object will grow to the actual image size.

We deal with art galleries and museums and they tend to have single page reports which an image at the top and related data at the bottom. With the Can Grow option set this is not possible.

How am I able to either get access to the report engine to replicate the existing functionality that we have or how am I able to achieve this using the Crystal 2020 Ole Object? i.e how can variable sized images be displayed in a fixed size Ole Object with their correct aspect ratio maintained?

entry.title: Re: Can't create destination service for a UI5 app for Build Work Zone
entry.content: Why don't you give your destination a name? How would you expect to use a destination without a name?

entry.title: Overall status of sales order (IC -CTAD) showing irrevalent even after applying reason of rejection.
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Good Day.!

We are unable to keep overall status of sales order as completed after applying reason for rejection for item category CTAD. Once applying reason for rejection sale order overall status has become “Not relevant” instead of” completed”. PFA attached document for reference.

Thanks and regards,

Akash Kadam

entry.title: Re: BTP CF APPROUTER AuthType None Problems
Re: USER_CATALOGS table not filled
entry.content:
The table/CDS view can be filled as follows:

  1. Enterprise Resource Planning Blogs by SAP (This blog describes the approach very well)
    https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/how-to-create-business-users-in-sap-s-4hana/ba-p/13580853
  2. Once created, you can now find the user in the ‘Default Settings for Users - Purchase Requisitions’ app
    In the lower ‘Assigned Catalogs’ area, you can now fill in the USER_CATALOGS table/CDS view.

entry.title: Re: BTP CF APPROUTER AuthType None Problems
entry.content:
Yes, that's exactly right. I want to configure it as like that.
TEST-ROUTER.CFAPPS.~ < ALLOW
TEST-ROUTER.CFAPPS/UI.~ < ALLOW
TEST-ROUTER.CFAPPS/API.~ < ALLOW
TEST-UI.CFAPPS.~ < DENY
TEST-BACKEND.CFAPPS.~ < DENY

entry.title: Re: How to read/write SAP CPI Datastore from Groovy
entry.content: Awesome this works even in message mappings and simplified my integration flow a lot. The alternative was to use Data store Variables in content modifiers, this is better!

entry.title: IE05 only 1 value can be shown for a given multi value characteristics
entry.content:
Hi SAP Guru,

it is observed as an issue that ONLY 1 characteristics value can be shown in IE05 for characteristics with multi values.

Fig 1. Characteristics

Fig 2.

2 Values maintained in Equipment

Fig 3. In IE05 only the 2nd/last value can be displayed.

Please kindly help.

Sally

entry.title: Re: REST vs. OData in SAP PO
entry.content: If I knew, the problem wouldn't occur 😉

entry.title: Re: Technical details - HANA licensing
entry.content:
Hi Srikanth,

as always with SAP licenses: It depends.

If you pull the data through an API from the S/4HANA system, this is classic Indirect Use.

However, if you are already licensed with SAP Digital Access, this Indirect Use will not be subject to additional license cost, as for Digital Access only the amount of documents created in the system will be charged.

If you are not licensed with SAP Digital Access, this Indirect Use will have to be licensed. I suppose that in this case you are in the Named User licensing model of Indirect Use. This would mean that (theoretically) you would have to license all users of the third party system (where the user and role data is used in) with an appropriate SAP Named User license. However, if those users in the third party system already have an SAP Named User license, because they also work in the SAP systems, then they are already licensed and you don't need to get additional Named User licenses.

Hope this helps, but as always with Indirect Use: It depends on the specific use case.

Best regards,

Torben

entry.title: Re: Subcontracting Process for Material Testing in SAP
entry.content: Have you thought about setting up a second order item for a service that you can use to pay the balance for the 2 items?

entry.title: Re: REST vs. OData in SAP PO
entry.content: Token is fine. That part is not the problem. I can clearly see it in the SAP Gateway traces.

entry.title: Re: Important Notice: Changes in SAP Analytics Cloud Classic Stories & Analytic Applications
entry.content:
Hi @Tunir ,

at the moment the feature compatibility of reporting layout in ODE is quite poor (Create Reporting Layouts with Headers, Footers, and Margins | SAP Help Portal😞 The list of features not supported is longer than the list of features being supported!
Scripting for example, which is in my opinion one of the most important features, is not supported!
When will this finally be available?

Best regards and thanks!

entry.title: Re: ATP check for sto purchase orders
entry.content: Hello Jagadeepsingh83, Thankyou for the reply. i couldnot find something like this for in s4 hana public cloud as shown in note. i was able to see only options of 1.Configure Delivery Type & Availability Check Procedure by Plant, 2.Configure Scope of Availability Check(in sales part not in purchase part

entry.title: Re: BTP CF APPROUTER AuthType None Problems
entry.content:
Despite the fact that Cloud Foundry would support Internal container-to-container routes the influencing request Creation of internal routes for container-to-container communication was rejected by SAP.

I highly recommend that if your backend exposes private information you secure it accordingly and use the Approuter to authenticate the end users. You can also serve the static content directly from the approuter. That way you can save some custs for the runtime.

entry.title: Re: How to add reviewer in Manage Workflows for Purchase...
entry.content:
Hello @sridharren 

Yes that option is not available for the PO and only available for the PR. Please raise this as missing functionality via influence request.

Additionally, I think reviewing more more sense at PR before those request turns into PO.

Thanks and Regards,

Vijayendra

entry.title: I am unable to delivery a sales order."An item with no delivery quantity is not permitted.
Re: Abap program to end specific User's Program, by sesion/tcode or GUIID
entry.content:
Thank you for the assistance, that worked 🙂

Just out of curiosity do you know a way to end a users program in fashion similar to LEAVE PROGRAM, as in a service that listens to a request of closing a program and returning the user to their previous "page".
